rules: No generic Sans (Inter, Roboto) for headings.
Use 'Outfit' for all headings and 'Figtree' for body.
Overlines are Uppercase, tiny, wide spacing.
Participant mode strictly uses very large typography (min 24pt for body).

spacing_and_layout.caregiver_mode: Control Room Grid. Base grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap-6. Compact density, 1px solid borders. Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structures.
spacing_and_layout.participant_mode: Single column or max 2 column grid. Gap-8. Huge paddings (p-8, p-12). Massive tap targets.
general: Generous spacing for padding: p-6 or p-8 inside cards.
Containers with borders must have internal padding.

buttons.caregiver: Rounded-md, solid colors, crisp. Explicit hover states (hover:bg-primary/90 hover:text-white).
buttons.participant: Massive height, rounded-2xl or full, extremely clear contrast and large text.

components.cards: Solid background (surface or surface_secondary), 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow by default. Hover adds slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
components.navigation: Header with Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) or Solid background, sticky z-50. 1px bottom border. Navigation must be visible on desktop.

logos.description: Premium organic logo mark for Kindred.

accessibility.contrast: WCAG 2.2 AA compliant. Normal text minimum 4.5:1. Participant mode demands high legibility.
accessibility.motion: Minimal animations, mostly micro-interactions. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-statement-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI components.
Implement two separate views/modes: Caregiver Dashboard and Participant View. Role selection on login/signup.
Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Figtree' for body text. Add them via Google Fonts.
Install and use lucide-react for standard icons.
Caregiver view: Information-dense, scannable. Show budget burn across three streams, lifetime cap progress, alerts/anomalies, and family thread.
Participant view: Massively scaled typography (24pt body), single-action focus, today's appointments, budget in one number/sentence, huge 'call my daughter' & 'something's not right' buttons.
Avoid typical US/UK aged-care stock imagery. Rely on the calm textures, clean typography, and organic UI styling provided.
Ensure all buttons, inputs, and major sections have data-testid attributes.
